arts.ttl: Why Leeds United diehards are among 'most dedicated in EFL'
arts.sum: Bristol Street Motors have crunched the data for the number of fans who travelled on the road during the 2023/24 season and how many miles they racked up along the way. The Whites, who missed out on an instant Premier League return after losing to Southampton in the play-off final at Wembley, finished third in the research, which includes clubs from the Championship, League One and League Two. United are estimated to have sold around 63,000 away tickets last term, with the average fan travelling around 3,200 miles.

arts.ttl: Leeds could cost Erol Bulut his Cardiff job with win today
arts.sum: Leeds United take on Cardiff City this afternoon looking to get back to winning ways, and they face a Bluebirds side in turmoil with Erol Bulut massively under pressure in the dugout. Should Leeds come away from Wales with three points, it might see Cardiff pull the trigger on Bulut, 13 months on from his dramatic first game in charge, a 2-2 draw at Elland Road on 23/24’s opening weekend.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke is forced to find perfect solution for £10m Leeds United star today
arts.sum: Leeds United take on Cardiff City this afternoon needing a better attacking display to secure a win than they mustered up against Burnley, which should mean more involvement for Largie Ramazani . He made his debut against Hull City as the hosts looked to see out that 2-0 win, but combined with his late cameo against Burnley, the winger has only managed 28 minutes across two games thus far.

arts.ttl: Leeds United can set boo boys off with perfect dose of needle and nightmare fuel
arts.sum: We start our run through five things to look out for during this afternoon’s clash between Cardiff City and Leeds United with the home crowd. Illan Meslier, Firpo, Rodon, Ampadu and Gruev are the only realistic survivors of that 3-0 win in the Welsh capital, and even two of those remain injury doubts.

arts.sum: Contracts for Junior Firpo and Sam Byram will be discussed in due course by Daniel Farke, but he admits Leeds United’s busy summer had pushed their future down his list of priorities. arts.ttl: Daniel Farke will face major Leeds United backlash if he doesn’t make obvious change tomorrow
arts.sum: Any threat Leeds looked to pose came from shifting the ball wide to the wingers and trying to work an angle to shoot from there, but those openings were few and far between, not helped by the lack of cohesion through the middle that would have added balance and variety to Leeds’ attack – a problem we often saw last season too. Farke simply must give Ao Tanaka his first Leeds start v Cardiff City

arts.ttl: 49ers fuming: EFL punishment could come shockingly late from Leeds United’s perspective
arts.sum: Leeds United fell short of promotion last season as Leicester City won the title, but the EFL are looking to clamp down on the Foxes with a belated punishment. Relegated from the top flight along with Leeds, the Foxes were found in breach of PSR and charged for it – but won their appeal very recently on the basis that they fell outside of PL jurisdiction when the charge came last season, when they were fighting for promotion.
